subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord! All the oceans partake in the mention of Thy name, all the summits celebrate Thy praise,all the rivers laud Thy virtues
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من نطقت البحار بذکرک و الجبال بثنائک و الانهار بوصفک و الشموس بنعتک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
